label: rock
groundingNote: a thing of one kind; it is not living; there are many of these things on the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m], inside it; when the body touches one of these things, it feels not like other things: if someone does something to it, nothing happens to it; some are very big, some are very small
notes: Material kind (NSM stone [m]); hardness approximated as unaffectedness.
